---
title: "Ladies\' Home, 21 Abbey Road, St. John\'s Wood, The"
---

## Ladies\' Home, 21 Abbey Road, St. John\'s Wood, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This charitable institution was described by [[person:19]Caroline Alcock] in \'The Ladies\' Home\' <i>MP</i> (August 1867) 179-80.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
